questions.question: What visible component matches this description: the central mythological male figure?
questions.rgb_answer: The central figure is a male statue, likely representing a god or mythological character, who is standing with one foot on a rock and the other raised, holding what appears to be a cloth or garment in his left hand. He has a beard and is wearing a draped garment that falls over one shoulder, leaving the other bare. The statue is positioned above a fountain, with water flowing from its base. This figure is part of a larger group of statues that are part of the Trevi Fountain in Rome, Italy.
